Home / Service Areas / Kansas City

Remodeling contractor in Kansas City, MO

Trusted local professionals serving Kansas City and surrounding communities

Serving Kansas City, MO

The Guys Next Door LLC provides remodeling services throughout Kansas City, Missouri. From historic homes in the urban core to newer constructions in the suburbs, Kansas City offers a diverse range of architectural styles and remodeling needs. We are equipped to handle projects of any size and complexity. We specialize in kitchen and bathroom remodels, historic renovations, and home additions, tailored to the specific requirements of Kansas City homeowners. We are committed to quality workmanship and customer satisfaction. We also offer solutions for weatherizing your home against the harsh Missouri winters.

Kansas City's diverse neighborhoods offer a mix of historic charm and modern amenities, requiring a versatile remodeling approach.

Remodeling contractor Services in Kansas City
